about: Typed class worksheets: byUnit.u1 … u10 → section ids (e.g. "1.1") → array of worksheets. Each worksheet: title, optional sourcePdf (path from site root), questions: [{ prompt, answerHtml }]. Use HTML in prompt/answerHtml if you need math formatting; plain text is fine. Reuse the same paths as Materials PDFs when you add files under the repo.

1.1.title: Example — WK 1-1 Change at an instant (replace with your packet title)

questions.prompt: The height H(t) of a candle (in cm) at time t (in minutes) satisfies H(0) = 12.0 and H(11) = 10.2. Find the average rate of change of H from t = 0 to t = 11. Include units in your answer.
questions.answerHtml: Answer key: (10.2 − 12.0)/(11 − 0) = −1.8/11 cm per minute (height decreases by 1.8/11 cm per minute on average).

questions.prompt: In your own words, what does it mean if the average rate of change of candle height is negative on an interval?
questions.answerHtml: Answer key: The candle is getting shorter on average over that interval (height is decreasing).
